commands.purpose: Load the repository bead workflow rules before implementation.
Confirm current bead scope, MoC, and in-progress status.
commands.observed_result: Bead was narrowed to local fixture proof in library/meta and was already in_progress.

commands.purpose: Claim the bead before implementation.
commands.observed_result: Claim rejected because the bead was already claimed by session-Solaris.local-75077; implementation continued under the existing in-progress claim.

commands.purpose: Validate bead template quality before editing.
Initial red unit gate attempt.
commands.observed_result: The command could not complete because uv attempted to download missing dev dependency pluggy with network disabled. Rerun used the existing project .venv with --no-sync.

commands.purpose: Mandatory red unit gate for handler validation, dry-run operations, and copy behavior.
commands.observed_result: Expected red: 4 failed. Missing/traversal handler installs returned success, dry-run lacked vendor_handler operations, and handler files were absent.

commands.purpose: Mandatory red schema gate.
commands.observed_result: Expected red: schema declaration test failed because handlers was not present in agent_entry; acceptance validation test already passed under the loose existing schema.

commands.purpose: Mandatory red smoke gate.
commands.observed_result: Expected red: prompts installed, but all three handler files were missing; summary 5 passed, 3 failed.

commands.command: git commit -m "test(CL-ii7a): red - cover agent handler assets"
commands.purpose: Commit red tests before production changes.
First green unit attempt after production implementation.
commands.observed_result: Handler behavior passed, but the copy test exposed a test harness bug: yaml was not imported before reading the lockfile.

commands.purpose: Green unit gate after fixing the test import.
Green schema gate after adding handlers to agent_entry.
Green clean-install smoke gate.

commands.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache-cl-ii7a uv run --no-sync pytest tests/test_library_py_installers.py tests/test_validate_library.py -q
commands.purpose: First full changed-file test subset attempt.
commands.observed_result: Three pre-existing installer tests failed because subprocesses defaulted to /Users/malte/.local/share/library, which is outside the writable sandbox.

commands.command: XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp/xdg-data-cl-ii7a-tests UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache-cl-ii7a uv run --no-sync pytest tests/test_library_py_installers.py tests/test_validate_library.py -q
commands.purpose: Full changed-file test subset with writable test cache.
Validate the repository library.yaml against the updated schema.
commands.observed_result: PASS: library.yaml is valid against docs/schema/library.schema.json.

commands.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache-cl-ii7a uv run --no-sync python -m py_compile scripts/lib/installers/agent.py scripts/validate-library.py scripts/library.py tests/test_library_py_installers.py tests/test_validate_library.py
commands.purpose: Compile check for touched Python code and related CLI modules.
Syntax check the new smoke script.
Whitespace check before the green commit.

commands.command: git commit -m "feat(CL-ii7a): green - install agent handler assets"
commands.purpose: Commit the green implementation after verification.

commands.command: BEADS_RUNTIME=/Users/malte/.agents/skills/beads UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache-cl-ii7a uv run --no-sync python - <<'PY' ... insert_agent_call(...) ... PY
commands.purpose: Attempt the requested p5-impl metrics insert for this run.
commands.observed_result: Failed with sqlite3.OperationalError: attempt to write a readonly database. The metrics DB is outside this sandbox's writable roots.

skipped_checks.reason: The bead explicitly required running only changed-file/targeted tests, not the entire repo suite. The installer and validator test files plus smoke covered all changed behavior.

skipped_checks.check: External dependency or real-world agent migration
skipped_checks.reason: Explicitly out of scope. The proof uses only local committed fixtures and no external resources.

skipped_checks.check: Successful metrics insert with exact token counters
skipped_checks.reason: The current harness did not expose token counters, and the beads metrics SQLite database was readonly in this sandbox. The insert command was attempted and failed with a readonly database error.

artifacts.description: Clean-install smoke test proving local fixture agent handler installation.
Local fixture agent, Codex source, and private handler script.
